title: Member Guidance on Prisoners who are Transgender
body: "The purpose of this guidance is to:   Provide practical guidance for Parole Board members (‘members’) when undertaking parole reviews of prisoners who are transgender Help ensure that members treat all people fairly when undertaking a parole review Provide a definition of relevant terms Signpost to relevant legislation Signpost to key aspects of the HM Prison and Probation Service (HMPPS) Policy Framework (In the Care and Management of Individuals who are Transgender)   Version 2.1 (June 2025) replaces all previous Parole Board guidance on Prisoners who are Transgender. "
